pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Gentoo-specific thin replacement for the upstream espeakng-loader package on PyPI. Upstream ships pre-built wheels with a bundled libespeak-ng.so binary per platform — Gentoo-hostile vendoring. This ebuild installs a hand-written module exposing the same four-function API (get_library_path / get_data_path / load_library / make_library_available) but returns system paths from app-accessibility/espeak-ng.
Used by dev-python/misaki[en] in the kokoro chain.
